description: Stores patron data used to calculate patron blocks

id.description: Unique ID of the user summary

recall.description: Indicates if the item was recalled

itemLost.description: Indicates if the item associated with the loan is in status 'Aged to lost' or 'Declared lost'

itemClaimedReturned.description: Indicates if the item associated with the loan is in status 'Claimed returned'

gracePeriod.description: The time after the due date during which penalties are deferred.

feeFineTypeId.description: Unique ID of the fee/fine type
feeFineTypeId.x-fqm-value-getter: (SELECT array_agg(fee_fine_type.value->>'feeFineTypeId' ORDER BY fee_fine_type.value->>'feeFineTypeId') FROM jsonb_array_elements(:src__circulation__patron_blocks__user_summary.jsonb->'openFeesFines') AS fee_fine_type)
feeFineTypeId.x-fqm-filter-value-getter: (SELECT array_agg(fee_fine_type.value->>'feeFineTypeId' ORDER BY fee_fine_type.value->>'feeFineTypeId') FROM jsonb_array_elements(:src__circulation__patron_blocks__user_summary.jsonb->'openFeesFines') AS fee_fine_type)

loanId.description: Unique ID of the loan the fee/fine was created for

openFeesFines.x-fqm-value-getter: ( SELECT jsonb_agg( record.value || jsonb_build_object('feeFineType', fee_fine_type.jsonb ->> 'feeFineType') ORDER BY record.value ->> 'feeFineTypeId') FROM jsonb_array_elements((:sourceAlias.jsonb -> 'openFeesFines')) record(value) LEFT JOIN ${tenant_id}_mod_fqm_manager.src__circulation__feesfines__feefines fee_fine_type ON (record.value ->> 'feeFineTypeId') = fee_fine_type.id::text)::text

metadata.description: Metadata about object's creation and changes. Is provided by server, not by client.
